2606.13355.title: Real-Time Execution with Autoregressive Policies
2606.13355.paper_summary: Real-time execution, enabled by asynchronous inference that ensures both smooth action trajectories and fast reactivity, is critical for realistic deployments of large-scale Vision-Language-Action models. However, recent work on real-time execution primarily focuses on variants of diffusion policies, even though it is more critical for autoregressive policies given their slower rollout speed in synchronous inference. In contrast, we demonstrate that autoregressive policies can achieve real-time execution by adjusting the tokenization horizon and applying constrained decoding, thereby guaranteeing strict latency bounds that enable multi-trajectory decoding to maximize performance. Across simulated and real-world environments, we find that the autoregressive policy consistently outperforms its equivalent-level flow-matching policy counterpart while achieving significantly improved task completion speeds from synchronous inference. Coupled with the inherent advantages of autoregressive policies, such as faster convergence and better generalizability in instruction-following, these results confirm that autoregressive policies can remain a competitive policy type supporting real-time execution.
2606.13355.paper_summary_zh: 即時執行透過非同步推理實現，確保順暢的行動軌跡和快速的反應，對於大規模視覺-語言-行動模型的現實部署至關重要。<lb/>然而，近期針對即時執行的研究主要集中在擴散策略的變體上，儘管對於自回歸策略來說，由於其在同步推理中的較慢展開速度，這一點更為關鍵。<lb/>相對而言，我們展示了自回歸策略可以通過調整標記化範圍和應用受限解碼來實現即時執行，從而保證嚴格的延遲界限，使多軌跡解碼最大化性能。<lb/>在模擬和現實環境中，我們發現自回歸策略始終優於其同等級的流匹配策略，同時從同步推理中顯著提高了任務完成速度。<lb/>結合自回歸策略固有的優勢，如更快的收斂速度和在遵循指令方面更好的泛化能力，這些結果證實自回歸策略可以保持作為支持即時執行的競爭性策略類型。
2606.13355.author: Sangkyu Lee et.al.
2606.13355.authors: Sangkyu Lee, Seohyeon Park, Tackgeun You, Avi Caciularu, Idan Szpektor, Hwasup Lim, Youngjae Yu
